name: 402-extension-firefox
description: Firefox extension for automatic BRC-0121 payments via BSV wallet

scripts.package: npm run sync-version && npm run build && rm -f 402-extension-firefox.xpi && zip -r 402-extension-firefox.xpi manifest.json dist/background.js icons/
scripts.package-sources: rm -f 402-extension-firefox-sources.zip && zip -r 402-extension-firefox-sources.zip src/ build.ts package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json manifest.json FOR_REVIEWERS.md --exclude '*.DS_Store'
